chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1396 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Ubedullah Malano, Advocate along with petitioner No.1 Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General ************** Respondent No.3 has filed a written statement, same is taken on record. However, counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant Constitution Petition. Accordingly, same is disposed of as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
